name: ASUS PRIME H610M-E D4-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-3200 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - DisplayPort 1.4 - D-Sub - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek GbE LAN
shortName: ASUS PRIME H610M-E D4-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Budget-friendly micro-ATX motherboard with LGA 1700 socket and DDR4 support for entry-level builds.
